definition: Common Claude use cases are recurring workflows—drafting, research synthesis, coding assistance, customer support, and knowledge work—where natural-language AI augments human judgment rather than replacing domain expertise.
layman: People use Claude for everyday knowledge jobs: write this email, explain this doc, help debug this code, or brainstorm ideas—always checking important results themselves.
content:
## Common use cases

Once you know **what Claude is** and **what it can do**, the next question is **where it fits in real work**. Use cases here are **patterns**, not guarantees—success depends on task fit, prompt quality, model choice, and human oversight.

### Individual productivity

| Use case | What Claude does | Human role |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Email & messaging** | Draft replies, adjust tone, shorten threads | Send only after factual check |
| **Learning & explainers** | Teach concepts, quiz you, analogies | Verify against curricula or docs |
| **Personal planning** | Brainstorm itineraries, packing lists, agendas | Confirm dates, prices, reservations |
| **Writing** | Outlines, blog drafts, cover letters | Edit for voice and accuracy |

### Knowledge work & business

| Use case | What Claude does | Human role |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Document synthesis** | Summaries, meeting notes, action items | Validate names, numbers, commitments |
| **Research assist** | Compare approaches, literature-style summaries | Cite primary sources for claims |
| **Policy & ops drafts** | First-pass SOPs, checklists, FAQs | Legal/ops approval before publish |
| **Data narrative** | Explain charts, draft insights from pasted tables | Analyst verifies calculations |

### Software & data teams

| Use case | What Claude does | Human role |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Code comprehension** | Explain modules, suggest refactors | Review diffs, run CI |
| **Test & doc generation** | Scaffold tests, README sections | Ensure coverage and correctness |
| **Incident triage** | Summarize logs pasted into chat | Engineer confirms root cause |
| **API prototyping** | Sample requests, parsing helpers | Secure keys, load-test, monitor costs |

### Customer-facing & support (via API or assisted agents)

| Use case | What Claude does | Human role |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Tier-1 assist** | Answer FAQs from a knowledge base you provide | Escalate edge cases |
| **Ticket drafting** | Suggested replies from case history | Agent edits before send |
| **Multilingual support** | Translate and localize responses | Native speaker QA for brand voice |

### Creative & content teams

| Use case | What Claude does | Human role |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Brainstorming** | Variations on headlines, hooks, campaign angles | Brand/legal review |
| **Structured content** | Outlines, scripts, social batches | Final creative direction |

### When Claude is a poor primary tool

- **Authoritative real-time data** without tools or retrieval (stock ticks, live sports scores).
- **High-stakes decisions** alone (medical treatment, legal strategy, safety-critical control).
- **Perfect recall of private data** you never supplied.
- **Heavy numerical ETL** on huge datasets—use code/SQL pipelines; use Claude to explain or generate queries.

See **Best-fit tasks** and **Choosing vs alternatives** for selection guidance; **Limitations** for failure modes.
keyPoints: Use cases cluster around language-heavy knowledge work with a human in the loop.
Business value usually comes from faster drafts and synthesis—not unsupervised decisions.
Developer use cases extend into APIs, tools, and coding workflows.
Poor fits include real-time facts, high-stakes solo decisions, and bulk data processing.
Sibling topics cover access paths, comparisons, and when to pick Claude over alternatives.
